seoTitle: Murlong vs Murputja — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Murlong and Murputja. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Murlong and Murputja.
heading: Murlong vs Murputja — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murlong, South Australia and Murputja, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murlong has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Murputja (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murlong or Murputja safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murlong has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Murputja scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murlong scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Murputja scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murlong or Murputja?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murlong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
